THE BENEFITS OF BUBBLES
articles.summary: The AI frenzy is a bubble, but bubbles often build the future. Even if the hype bursts, today's rush to invest in chips, power, and new ideas could spark lasting innovations that drive growth for generations.

articles.title: PROTOTYPES VS PRODUCTS
articles.summary: Gen AI prototyping tools expand product creation access. However, they blur the line between prototypes and real products, which require far greater complexity, reliability, and scalability.

articles.title: MISSION, VISION, POTAYTO, POTAHTO
articles.summary: Most companies use “mission” and “vision” as hollow slogans. However, when done right, they clarify purpose, guide choices, and connect profit to impact. Define why you exist, what future you're building, and the next milestone to get there - words only matter if they drive action.

articles.title: BRAINDUMP ON VIRAL LOOPS
articles.summary: Web 2.0 established engineered viral loops and the viral factor, but mobile and saturation ended classic virality. Durable growth now comes from retention-led, multi-loop products. Flashy tactics only create spikes.

articles.title: SIGNALS-BASED VERIFICATION: IT'S NOT (JUST) ABOUT STOPPING FRAUD
articles.summary: Product leaders can improve user verification flows by layering passive, active, and behavioral signals. While the most common use case for risk signals is fraud, you can use the same principles to increase conversion, reduce friction, and make verification smarter [9] and more dynamic. Learn how to use signals across the customer journey in Persona's guide to a signals-based product strategy [9].

articles.title: 21 TEMPLATES FOR PMS TO SAVE YOU HUNDREDS OF HOURS AND NERVES
articles.summary: These free templates can help product teams sharpen thinking and improve decisions across leadership, strategy, discovery, and delivery.

articles.title: YOU CAN JUST READ 25 BOOKS
articles.summary: A curated list of underrated books that offer timeless insights on leadership, innovation, resilience, and creativity across diverse fields.

articles.title: HOW TO GET FEEDBACK
articles.summary: As leaders rise, honest feedback fades. Building trust, inviting openness, and modeling vulnerability make feedback safe and essential for continued growth.

articles.title: WHY VALUE OUTLASTS VALUATION
articles.summary: Enduring success in technology comes from creating real value, not chasing inflated valuations. Lasting impact arises when products solve genuine problems rather than impressing investors with hype.

articles.title: WHY AI AGENTS WILL SPECIALIZE LIKE PEOPLE, NOT CENTRALIZE LIKE PLATFORMS
articles.summary: True value comes from domain depth, not one-size-fits-all solutions.

articles.title: WHEN TO RECOGNIZE YOUR OKR PLANNING TAKES TOO LONG
articles.summary: Once goals clearly guide decisions and tradeoffs, stop polishing and start executing.
